title: Supplementary data for: "On the path to reference genomes for all biodiversity: laboratory protocols and lessons learned from processing the first 2000 species in the Sanger Tree of Life"
author: Howard, Caroline
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description:
Data Description 
 Overview 
 This dataset accompanies the manuscript titled  "On the path to reference genomes for all biodiversity: laboratory protocols and lessons learned from processing the first 2000 species in the Sanger Tree of Life" . Supplementary data for the manuscript contains three .csv files, which contain information on the DNA extractions, DNA fragmentations, and RNA extractions undertaken by the Tree of Life until 01/06/2024. 
 Datasets Included: 
 
  dna_extractions_dataset.csv : Contains data on DNA extractions, including sample identifiers and metadata, extraction methods, yields, and extraction status. 
  dna_fragmentations_dataset.csv : Contains data on DNA fragmentations, including sample identifiers and metadata, links to the extractions, submission protocols used, and fragmentation statuses. 
  rna_extractions_dataset.csv : Contains data on RNA fragmentations, including sample identifiers and metadata, extraction methods and quality metrics. 
 
 For full column descriptions, refer to  readme.md
